top_signals.title: Maritime Association of the Port of New York and New Jersey Hosts 32nd Hall of Fame Awards
top_signals.summary: Nearly 500 maritime and transportation industry leaders gathered on the evening of Wednesday, May 20, at The Lighthouse at Chelsea Piers for the sold-out 32nd International Maritime Hall of Fame Awards dinner hosted by the Maritime Association of the Port of New York and New Jersey (MAPONY/NJ).
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New Grads Face the Tightest Labor Market in Years
top_signals.summary: First jobs? In this economy? On today’s Big Take podcast: How 2026 college graduates are adapting to a low-hire, low-fire environment. (Source: Bloomberg)
